content.text:
I... 

*[pause, slight shift]*

I mean, it's not true. So.

But like -- theoretically? My director would see it. The team would see it. I've been in this company for six years and I finally got the thing I wanted and if I blow it... I don't know. They'd probably pull me off the project. Give it to someone else. And everyone would just -- they'd know. That I couldn't actually do it.

But that's not what's happening. I'm just behind on some stuff. That's different.

...right?
